LIMBUS_SANITY.title: Sanity Point (SP)
LIMBUS_SANITY.description:
Gain SP equal to [blue]100%[/blue] damage dealt.
Lose SP equal to [red]200%[/red] damage taken.
Gain [blue]5[/blue] SP on kill.
At below [red]0[/red] SP: has a chance to deal less damage.
At [red]-30[/red] SP: enters a [red]Panic[/red].
At [red]-35[/red] to [red]-45[/red] SP: has a chance to completely skip a turn.
